title: Sukin Natural Conditioner 1L X 2
detail_text: Sukin Natural Balance Conditioner Twin Pack (1L x 2) for soft, balanced hair A gentle, vegan conditioner formulated to hydrate, smooth, and revitalise hair without heaviness. Botanical extracts and nourishing natural oils help restore moisture, enhance natural shine, and improve manageability. Free from sulphates and silicones, suitable for regular use. Benefits 1. Hydrates and smooths dry or stressed hair 2. Supports healthy-looking hair and natural shine 3. Nourishes and softens without build-up 4. Improves manageability and reduces frizz How to Use Apply to clean, damp hair after shampooing. Massage through mid-lengths and ends, leave for 1 minute, then rinse thoroughly. Ingredients Hydrating Water, Aloe Vera, Cetyl Alcohol, Panthenol (Provitamin B5), Burdock Extract, Nettle Extract, Horsetail Extract, Baobab Oil, Sesame Oil, Natural Fragrance, Preservatives. Natural Balance Water, Shea Butter, Coconut Oil, Sesame Oil, Olive Oil, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin E, Conditioning Agents, Natural Fragrance, Preservatives.
detail_html:
Sukin Natural Balance Conditioner Twin Pack (1L x 2) for soft, balanced hair

A gentle, vegan conditioner formulated to hydrate, smooth, and revitalise hair without heaviness. Botanical extracts and nourishing natural oils help restore moisture, enhance natural shine, and improve manageability. Free from sulphates and silicones, suitable for regular use.

Benefits

1. Hydrates and smooths dry or stressed hair

2. Supports healthy-looking hair and natural shine

3. Nourishes and softens without build-up

4. Improves manageability and reduces frizz

How to Use

Apply to clean, damp hair after shampooing. Massage through mid-lengths and ends, leave for 1 minute, then rinse thoroughly.

Ingredients

Hydrating

Water, Aloe Vera, Cetyl Alcohol, Panthenol (Provitamin B5), Burdock Extract, Nettle Extract, Horsetail Extract, Baobab Oil, Sesame Oil, Natural Fragrance, Preservatives.

Natural Balance

Water, Shea Butter, Coconut Oil, Sesame Oil, Olive Oil, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin E, Conditioning Agents, Natural Fragrance, Preservatives.

title: FINO Premium Touch Conditioner 550ml
detail_text: FINO Premium Touch Conditioner 550ml Care for your hair like your skin. Daily use conditioner formulated with 3 skincare inspired beauty serum ingredients, common with Japan's number 1 Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask*. The silky conditioner delivers beauty serum ingredients to elevate hair texture for silky smooth hair you can't stop touching. Suitable for dry, damaged and frizzy hair caused by UV rays, chemical treatments such as colouring, perming or straightening and hot styling tools like hair dryer and iron. Beauty Serum Ingredients 1. Royal Jelly Extract EX - Penetrates damaged areas inside the hair to moisturise hair. 2. PCA - Smoothens hair while improving glossiness. 3. Squalane - Softens and makes hair supple. For best results, use Fino Premium Touch Shampoo and Conditioner daily and Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask twice - thrice a week. Follow up with Fino Premium Touch Hair Oil or Hair Oil Serum Airy Smooth. *Intake SRI+ Rinse-off Treatment Market Share in Value, SKU rankings from Feb.2017 to Jan.2024 Product Usage: DIRECTIONS: Hold cap and turn nozzle in to unlock the pump, push pump a few times until conditioner is dispensed. After shampooing, apply an adequate amount to hair and rinse thoroughly with water. Product Warnings: Note: Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water. Do not let water enter the container when using. Please close the cap after use. If any irritation occurs, stop use and consult a doctor Keep out of reach of children. Not to be used for children under three years old.

detail_html:
Product Highlights:
Intensive Repair for Dry and Damaged Hair
Restores Shine, Softness, and Manageability
Proven Pantene Formula for Healthy Hair

Detailed Product Description:
Experience the ultimate hair transformation with Pantene Hair Conditioner Serum. Our advanced formula is specially designed to rejuvenate dry and damaged hair, providing deep nourishment and repair. Say goodbye to dullness and frizz as this serum restores your hair's natural shine, softness, and manageability. Enriched with proven Pantene ingredients, this serum penetrates deeply, revitalizing your hair from within. Reclaim the lustrous and healthy hair you deserve.

How to use
- Apply conditioner onto hair that is damp from washing.
- Massage all over the hair and leave it for 2-3 minutes.
- Rinse thoroughly

Size: 450ml

detail_html:
Klorane Radiance Conditioner with Pomegranate – 200ml

🌺 Protects Colour | Detangles Instantly | Prolongs Shine For colour-treated hair | Made in France | 95% naturally derived ingredients

🌟 Product Highlights

  • ✅ Detangles and softens colour-treated hair instantly
  • ✅ Nourishes hair lengths and ends to restore shine
  • ✅ Prolongs colour intensity and radiance from the first use**
  • ✅ Silicone-free, biodegradable*, and vegan***
  • ✅ Melting, creamy texture with a luxurious red berry scent
  • ✅ Eco-friendly packaging – 31% recycled materials, 100% recyclable
  • 🇫🇷 Made in France

🍇 Key Haircare Benefits

  • 💡 Colour Protection: Seals colour pigments to prevent fading
  • 🌈 Radiance Boost: Revives and enhances colour vibrancy and brilliance
  • ✨ Detangling & Smoothness: Instantly softens and smooths lengths for easy combing
  • 💧 Moisture & Nourishment: Restores softness and suppleness to dry, coloured hair
  • 🔬 Acidic pH Action: Tightens hair cuticle for longer-lasting colour shine

🔬 Key Ingredients

  • Pomegranate Bark Extract (Punica granatum): A patented colour-fixing ingredient rich in natural tannins and antioxidants. Hand-harvested in Morocco and sun-dried to preserve potency, it helps set colour on hair keratin and protects it from fading.
  • Stearyl Alcohol & Cetyl Alcohol: Plant-based fatty alcohols that condition and soften the hair.
  • Behenamidopropyl Dimethylamine: A gentle detangling agent derived from rapeseed oil.
  • Coco-Caprylate/Caprate: Provides lightweight emollience and silky smooth texture.
  • Citric Acid & Lactic Acid: Help balance pH and seal the cuticle for optimal shine and smoothness.

🌿 Ingredient Preferences

  • ✅ Naturally derived (95%)
  • ✅ Antioxidants (Pomegranate tannins)
  • ✅ Silicone-free
  • ✅ Biodegradable formula*
  • ✅ Vegan (no animal-derived ingredients)
  • ❌ No parabens
  • ❌ No sulphates
  • ❌ No phenoxyethanol
  • ❌ No mineral oil

Special Type:

  • 🌱 Naturally derived
  • 🧪 Vegan***
  • ♻️ Biodegradable
  • 🌍 Eco-designed packaging
  • 🚫 Silicone-free
  • 🚫 Sulphate-free

💆‍♀️ Who Should Use It

  • 👩‍🦰 Adults with colour-treated hair
  • 👩‍🦱 Ideal for anyone seeking radiance, softness, and long-lasting colour
  • 📅 Suitable for frequent or daily use

📈 Proven Results

  • ✅ 94% of users report instant detangling¹
  • ✅ 84% say their colour is enhanced¹
  • ✅ 85% experienced naturally prolonged shine¹

¹% satisfaction, usage test on 31 women *Biodegradability per OECD 301B test ***No animal-derived ingredients

🧴 How to Use

  1. APPLY: After shampooing, apply a small amount to towel-dried hair, focusing on lengths and ends.
  2. LEAVE ON: Let it sit for a few moments.
  3. RINSE: Rinse thoroughly. 📅 Use as often as needed to maintain shine and detangling.

🧪 Full Ingredient List

WATER (AQUA), STEARYL ALCOHOL, BEHENAMIDOPROPYL DIMETHYLAMINE*, C9-12 ALKANE*, CETYL ALCOHOL*, HYDROXYPROPYL STARCH PHOSPHATE, ETHYLHEXYL PALMITATE*, 1,2-HEXANEDIOL, PUNICA GRANATUM EXTRACT*, ALCOHOL*, CITRIC ACID*, COCO-CAPRYLATE/CAPRATE*, FRAGRANCE (PARFUM), LACTIC ACID*, OCTYLDODECANOL*, SODIUM BENZOATE, TRISODIUM ETHYLENEDIAMINE DISUCCINATE 95% naturally derived ingredients (*Plant-derived)

Always check the label for allergies or sensitivities before use.

🌍 Sustainability & Eco Design

  • 🌿 Pomegranate bark is hand-harvested using traditional methods and sun-dried in Morocco.
  • ♻️ Tube made with at least 31% recycled plastic and is fully recyclable
  • 🌱 Biodegradable formula and vegan-friendly

Expiry 01/2027

The Plantur 39 Colour Brown Colour Conditioner boosts the colour-intensifying effect of the shampoo. It works by covering grey hairs and light roots – the colour brilliance is enhanced each time the conditioner is used. Your hair is glossier, silkier and easier to comb. For a breathtaking shade of brown

  • Covers emerging grey hairs and light roots
  • For enhanced colour brilliance each time you use the conditioner

Application

Apply the Plantur 39 Colour Brown Colour Conditioner evenly throughout the hair, from the roots to the tips. Leave on for 2 to 5 minutes depending on the desired colour intensity. Then rinse out.

Tip: Use the Plantur 39 Colour Brown Phyto-Caffeine Shampoo to wash your hair in order to ensure best results.

detail_html:
(Bundle of 2) Sunsilk Smooth & Manageable Conditioner 320ml

Product Features

Product details of Sunsilk Conditioner :

1. Sunsilk Smooth & Manageable Conditioner :

-This exclusive formula with FlexiShield Technology and 5 Natural Oils, infuses hair with bounce and flexibility in movement, so you have smooth and manageable hair that always goes with your flow, so you have your hair always on your side!

-Suitable for Normal Hair.

2. Sunsilk Soft & Smooth Conditioner :

-Say goodbye to the rough and dry.

-Moisturize your hair, so it looks healthy, resilient and soft to touch.

3. Sunsilk Hair Fall Solution Conditioner :

-This Conditioner is best suitable for daily hair care and hair fall.

-This also adds health to the damaged and brittle hair by conditioning them.

-The Sunsilk conditioner contains natural ingredients and is best suitable for all hair types.

-This contains olive fruit oil, sunflower seed oil, pro-vitamin B5 and hydrogenated castor oil, which conditions, strengthens, and adds shine and volume to the hair.

-Tired of falling hair? This exclusive formula, with soya vitamin complex, deeply nourishes and revitalizes your hair, so that your hair is strong and healthy looking with reduced fall out by up to 10 times. Hair so strong it fights the loss.
